events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr turns 86, the legendary drummer of The Beatles turns 86 today.

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, we're celebrating with some of his biggest hits, including tracks from The Beatles and his solo career.

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May, the lead guitarist of Queen, turns 74 today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74 today, we're rocking out to some of Queen's biggest hits.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, turns 83 today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, we're celebrating with some of The Rolling Stones' biggest hits.

events.title: MTV Launched 47 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 47 years ago, with the first video being 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago.

angles.name: Oasis Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago, we're revisiting some of their biggest hits.

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, featuring performances from Jimi Hendrix and The Who.

angles.name: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
angles.copy: The legendary Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, we're celebrating with some of the era's biggest hits.

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis' death, the King of Rock and Roll passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977, we're playing some of his most iconic tracks.

events.title: Beatles release Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago.

angles.name: Beatles Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago, we're celebrating with some of the album's most beloved tracks.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the lead singer of The Pretenders, turns 75 today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, we're playing some of The Pretenders' biggest hits.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 55
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the former frontman of Oasis, turns 55 today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 55 today, we're revisiting some of Oasis' most iconic tracks.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' 51 years ago.

angles.name: John Lennon Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 51 years ago, we're celebrating with some of the album's most beloved tracks.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon would have been 86 today, the legendary musician and former Beatle passed away in 1980.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday
angles.copy: John Lennon would have been 86 today, we're remembering the legendary musician with some of his most iconic tracks.
